name: AIsa Twitter Research Engage Relay
description: Requires python3, and AISA_API_KEY. Uses the supplied AISA_API_KEY to send requests to https://api.aisa.one/apis/v1/twitter. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `aisa-twitter-research-engage-relay`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Run Twitter/X likes, follows, replies, and OAuth-gated posting through AIsa. Use when: the user already knows which account, tweet, or campaign to act on and needs explicit engagement workflows. Supports read context, engagement actions, and approved posting.

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.
